# kSecAttrPRF

**Global Variable**

A key whose value indicates the item’s pseudorandom function.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecAttrPRF: CFString
```

## Discussion

The corresponding value is of type [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFString] and indicates the pseudorandom function associated with this cryptographic key. See [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/item-attribute-keys-and-values#Pseudorandom-Function-Values] for a list of valid values.
title: kSecAttrPRF
